name: The Girls found it  (The Expansion Gel)
description:
Checked in on this bot and found out it was already almost finished so just tweaked it a bit and am uploading it now. Not gonna test it either lol so lemme know if there's a problem with it. Should have Fubuki, Gigi, Ina, Raora, Mio, Ollie, Kobo, Bijou, Matsuri, Subaru, Polka, and Ame (I dunno why I put so many in here back when I started it but whatever).

Edit: Thanks for 750 followers, not sure how I got this far but I'm glad all of you like my stuff so thanks.
creator: Pandapple
